headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 25, 2026**
article:
The Cincinnati Reds edged out the Detroit Tigers 9-8 in a high-scoring matchup, with Matt McLain leading the charge at the plate. McLain hit two home runs and drove in four runs, while Kyle Finnegan impressed on the mound with 1.2 scoreless innings and four strikeouts.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, impacting their team's availability. The Chicago Cubs placed left-handed pitcher Caleb Thielbar on the 15-day injured list due to a left hamstring strain. Other teams have also made injury-related moves, including the Colorado Rockies, Baltimore Orioles, Texas Rangers, New York Mets, and Atlanta Braves.

The MLB trade market has been active, with several teams making roster moves. The Toronto Blue Jays acquired catcher Willie MacIver from the Texas Rangers for cash. The Seattle Mariners traded right-hander Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for right-hander Ty Cummings. The Colorado Rockies traded third baseman Nicky Lopez to the Chicago Cubs for cash. The Houston Astros traded shortstop Braden Shewmake to the New York Yankees for right-hander Wilmy Sanchez.

top_news.title: **Reds Rally Past Tigers in Thrilling 9-8 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds edged out the Detroit Tigers 9-8 in a high-scoring matchup, with Matt McLain leading the charge at the plate. McLain hit two home runs and drove in four runs, while Kyle Finnegan impressed on the mound with 1.2 scoreless innings and four strikeouts.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Fall to Orioles in Blowout**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox suffered a 10-3 loss to the Baltimore Orioles, with Adley Rutschman leading the Orioles' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 6 RBIs. Brandon Young earned the win for the Orioles with 5.2 innings pitched, 5 strikeouts, and 3 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Guardians Take Down Blue Jays 8-6**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians secured an 8-6 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Angel Martínez leading the offense with 2 hits, 2 home runs, and 4 RBIs. Tommy Nance earned a strong relief appearance, striking out 3 batters in 1 inning of work.

top_news.title: Rockies Take Down Mets in Thrilling Finish
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies edged out the New York Mets 4-3 in a closely contested game. Michael Lorenzen earned the win for the Rockies.

top_news.title: **Mets Shut Down Rockies in Scoreless Tie**
top_news.summary: The New York Mets secured a 0-0 victory over the Colorado Rockies, with Francisco Lindor's team emerging on top. Ryan Feltner took the loss for the Rockies.

top_news.title: **Cubs Place Caleb Thielbar on 15-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Chicago Cubs left-handed pitcher Caleb Thielbar has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left hamstring strain.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Acquire Catcher Willie MacIver**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays have bolstered their roster with the addition of catcher Willie MacIver, acquired from the Texas Rangers in exchange for cash.
